oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Isabel la Católica : drama histórico en tres partes y seis jornadas /
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Rodríguez y Díaz Rubí, Tomás, 1817-1890.
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: No. 8, in vol. 491 with binder's title: Teatro Español : serie A.
oai_dc:dc.dc:subject: Isabella I, Queen of Spain, 1451-1504 -- Drama.
